approvalSource: Steve May 25 creator source strategy: extract enough recent videos across approved creators, grade sources S/A/B/C/D from real evidence, keep lane-specific value separate, and do not let Mark, ICOR, or any early source dominate the roadmap just because it was processed first.
notes: Approved for deterministic report-only source grading from existing full-watch and Director evidence. Not approved: deleting watchlist rows, mutating source systems, automatic backlog creation, sprint promotion, paid/private/auth extraction, model calls from the grader proof, or external writes.
